raw.official description: Enemies hit by Seismic Slam are slowed by 40% for 2 seconds.
Hitting an enemy into a wall with Rocket Punch reloads all Hand Cannon and overfills ammo by 2.
Power Block absorbs projectiles for the first 0.8 seconds of its duration.
raw.ability details: * The absorption functions similarly to [[File:Ability-dva3.png|sub|link=D.Va#Defense Matrix|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[D.Va#Defense Matrix|Defense Matrix]] and [[File:Abilities-sigma3.png|sub|link=Sigma#Kinetic Grasp|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Sigma#Kinetic Grasp|Kinetic Grasp]], fully negating the projectile before it hits. Melee, AoE and beam attacks and certain projectiles, like [[File:Abilities-sigma4.png|sub|link=Sigma#Accretion|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Sigma#Accretion|Accretion]] and [[File:Ability-Roadhog3.png|sub|link=Roadhog#Chain Hook|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Roadhog#Chain Hook|Chain Hook]], cannot be absorbed. * Absorbed projectiles' damage charges empowered Rocket Punch an equivalent amount to Power Block. * Any form of damage that cannot be absorbed still receives the baseline 80% mitigation from front. * The absorption area extends slightly forward, allowing Doomfist to absorb projectiles that would normally not hit him.

raw.official description: Hitting 3 or more enemies with Seismic Slam empowers Rocket Punch.
The Best Defense grants 25 overhealth from eliminations and its max overhealth is increased by 50.
Dealing damage with abilities creates temporary overhealth.
raw.ability details: * The total amount of [[overhealth]] gained through both methods is capped at +200 overhealth. * After 3 seconds, the overhealth starts decaying at 3 health per second. Dealing more ability damage will reset this condition. * Overhealth is only generated if the ability damages an enemy player. ** E.g. Hitting [[Zenyatta]] during [[File:Ability-zenyatta4.png|sub|link=Zenyatta#Transcendence|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Zenyatta#Transcendence|Transcendence]] or a construct such as [[Torbjörn|Torbjörn]]'s [[File:Ability-torbjorn3.png|sub|link=Torbjörn#Deploy Turret|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Torbjörn#Deploy Turret|Deploy Turret]] does not grant any overhealth.

raw.official description: Doomfist generates temporary personal shields when he deals ability damage.
raw.ability details:
* This ability has a statistic card named "Shields created."
* After 1 second, the shields start decaying at 3 shields per second.

raw.shot type: [[File:Quick_melee.png|40x40px|sub|class=inline-icon invert-image|link=Melee|Melee ]] Melee
raw.official description: Doomfist uppercuts enemies in front of him into the air.
raw.ability details:
* Enemies knocked into the air lose air control for 0.6 seconds.
* Doomfist is briefly suspended in the air after the uppercut, slowing his fall speed.
* This ability is removed in ''Overwatch 2''.

abilities.name: Seismic Slam
shot_type: [[File:Tectonic Shock icon.png|40x40px|sub|class=inline-icon invert-image|link=Shockwave|Shockwave ]] Shockwave [[File:Swift_Step_Icon.png|40x40px|sub|class=inline-icon invert-image|link=Movement ability|Movement ]] Movement

raw.shot type:
[[File:Tectonic Shock icon.png|40x40px|sub|class=inline-icon invert-image|link=Shockwave|Shockwave ]] Shockwave
[[File:Swift_Step_Icon.png|40x40px|sub|class=inline-icon invert-image|link=Movement ability|Movement ]] Movement
raw.official description: Leap forward and smash the ground.
raw.ability details: * Seismic Slam features a micro-lock that will fully stop a target's movement if they are airborne, but will do virtually nothing to a grounded target. * Seismic Slam can climb both up & down surfaces within its vertical range, similar to [[File:Ability-reinhardt5.png|sub|link=Reinhardt#Earthshatter|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Reinhardt#Earthshatter|Earthshatter]]. * Doomfist's momentum is retained if the ability is cancelled by Sleep Dart or Hack. * Seismic Slam can be canceled by reactivating the ability or activating any other ability. * Destroys fences and other breakables Doomfist collides with while leaping.

abilities.name: Power Block

raw.official description: Protect yourself from frontal attacks. Blocking heavy damage empowers Rocket Punch.
raw.ability details: * After mitigating 100 or more damage, the cooldown of [[File:Rocket_punch.png|sub|link=Doomfist#Rocket Punch|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Doomfist#Rocket Punch|Rocket Punch]] is immediately reset and the next Rocket Punch is empowered. ** If Doomfist is already Empowered, blocking 100 or more damage with Power Block will not reset the cooldown of Rocket Punch. ** The damage requirement is based on the damage mitigated rather than the raw incoming damage, therefore at least 133 incoming damage is required to empower a punch, as Power Block provides an 75% reduction (100 damage mitigated ÷ 75% = 133.3 raw incoming damage). * Power Block is a [[channeled]] ability; the ability is interrupted when Doomfist is affected by [[stunned]], [[knocked down]] or [[hacked]], including subsidiary effects. ** The impact damage from the instance that applied the effect will still be blocked with the exception of another Doomfist's Rocket Punch. * Damage is blocked if the horizontal angle between the direction Doomfist is facing and the direction from the impact location to its source is less than ~53 degrees. ** Doomfists's vertical view angle does not affect blocking, however his head hitbox may be exposed from some angles, allowing critical hits. * Effectiveness extends to area abilities and splash damage from projectiles. Damage is generally blocked when facing the center of the AoE. ** Damage from [[File:Ability-hanzo4.png|sub|link=Hanzo#Dragonstrike|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Hanzo#Dragonstrike|Dragonstrike]] and [[File:Ability-torbjorn5.png|sub|link=Torbjörn#Molten Core|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Torbjörn#Molten Core|Molten Core]] is blocked regardless of facing direction. ** Does not reduce damage from [[Sombra]]'s [[File:Ability Sombra EMP.png|sub|link=Sombra#EMP|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Sombra#EMP|EMP]] or Sigma's [[File:Abilities-sigma5.png|sub|link=Sigma#Gravitic Flux|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Sigma#Gravitic Flux|Gravitic Flux]] (incl. both lift and slam). * Power Block mitigates delayed or triggered detonation damage from stuck projectiles and debuffs, regardless of the direction Doomfist is facing. ** Following abilities are affected: [[File:A-36_Icon.png|sub|link=Bastion#A-36 Tactical Grenade|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Bastion#A-36 Tactical Grenade|A-36 Tactical Grenade]], [[File:STICKY BOMBS.png|sub|link=Echo#Sticky Bombs|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Echo#Sticky Bombs|Sticky Bombs]], [[File:Ability-tracer4.png|sub|link=Tracer#Pulse Bomb|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Tracer#Pulse Bomb|Pulse Bomb]] and [[File:Captive_sun_icon.png|sub|link=Illari#Captive Sun|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Illari#Captive Sun|Captive Sun]]. * Does not affect [[damage over time]] effects from abilities. * Power Block can be canceled by reactivating the ability, activating any other ability, or pressing primary fire.

abilities.name: Seismic Slam (old)
shot_type: [[File:Ability-parah3.png|40x40px|sub|class=inline-icon invert-image|link=Area of effect|Area of effect ]] Area of effect

raw.shot type: [[File:Ability-parah3.png|40x40px|sub|class=inline-icon invert-image|link=Area of effect|Area of effect ]] Area of effect
raw.official description: Doomfist leaps forward and smashes into the ground, knocking nearby enemies toward him.
raw.ability details:
* Damage scales with the time spent in air during the slam, up to a maximum of 125.
* While airborne, a blue, arc-shaped indicator will show where the ability will land. The orientation of the slam can be changed in the air.
* On flat ground, Seismic Slam horizontally propels Doomfist 8.22 meters and deals 49 damage. Adding a jump can increase this damage to 62.
* Locks camera for ~0.56 s. Then locks shooting for ~0.32 s.

abilities.name: Hand Cannon

raw.shot type: [[File:Ability-reaper1.png|40x40px|middle|class=inline-icon invert-image|link=Shotgun|Shotgun ]] Shotgun (projectile)
raw.official description: Short-range weapon with spread. Reloads automatically.
raw.fire rate:
3 volleys/s
1.36 volleys/s (continuous fire of final shot)
raw.dps: 73.3 while firing continuously, 165 burst from full ammo.
raw.ability details:
* Reloading automatically begins once the recovery (0.33 seconds) from previous shot ends, resulting the first projectile to be loaded after 0.73 seconds delay in total.
* Reloading is interrupted if Hand Cannons is fired.
* Using [[quick melee]] does not interfere with the reload timer.
* Damage per second: 73.3 while firing continuously, 165 burst from full ammo.

abilities.name: Rocket Punch

raw.shot type:
[[File:Quick_melee.png|40x40px|sub|class=inline-icon invert-image|link=Melee|Melee ]] Melee
[[File:Swift_Step_Icon.png|40x40px|sub|class=inline-icon invert-image|link=Movement ability|Movement ]] Movement
raw.official description: Hold to charge then release to launch forward and knock an enemy back. Damage increases if the enemy hits a wall.
raw.damage:
25 - 75 (base, impact damage)
10 - 40 (base, wall slam)
38 - 113 (empowered, impact damage)
15 - 60 (empowered, wall slam)
raw.cast time:
0.2 seconds (min)
1 seconds (full charge)
1.6 second (max)
0.4 seconds (fire recovery)
raw.duration:
0.5 seconds (max. travel time)
0.5 seconds (stun, punch impact)
0.15 seconds (stun, wall slam)
0.15 - 0.6 seconds (stun, empowered wall slam)
20 seconds (Empowered Rocket Punch max duration)
raw.ability details: * In addition to damage, charge also affects the distance the punch will travel and the distance of the knockback. * The punch impact hitbox is roughly the same size as Doomfist. * If Rocket Punch connects, it will also apply its effects to all targets in a small area behind the punched target. This is called 'Blastback'. ** The following [[deployable]]s are applicable punch targets to trigger the Blastback. [[Mei]]'s [[File:Ability-mei3.png|sub|link=Mei#Ice Wall|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Mei#Ice Wall|Ice Wall]], [[Torbjörn|Torbjörn]]'s [[File:Ability-torbjorn3.png|sub|link=Torbjörn#Deploy Turret|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Torbjörn#Deploy Turret|Deploy Turret]], [[Baptiste]]'s [[File:Baptiste-ability3.png|sub|link=Baptiste#Immortality Field|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Baptiste#Immortality Field|Immortality Field]], [[Illari]]'s [[File:Healing_pylon_icon.png|sub|link=Illari#Healing Pylon|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Illari#Healing Pylon|Healing Pylon]], [[Lifeweaver]]'s [[File:Tree_of_Life_Icon.png|sub|link=Lifeweaver#Tree of Life|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Lifeweaver#Tree of Life|Tree of Life]] and [[Hazard]]'s [[File:Jagged_Wall.png|sub|link=Hazard#Jagged Wall|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Hazard#Jagged Wall|Jagged Wall]]. * Rocket Punch briefly stuns enemies on initial impact and again for 0.15 seconds if the enemy is knocked against a wall. * Rocket Punch can be empowered by ''Could not find 'Power Block' in 'Abilities'. Check spelling and see [[Help:Cargo]] if the issue persists.'': ** An empowered Rocket Punch deals +50% damage, has +50% speed/distance, greatly increased blastback area, and the wall slam stuns the target for 0.15 - 0.6 seconds based on charge. * Rocket Punch has natural power limiters in the form of what is known as ‘Sliders’ & ‘Bouncers’. Both are intentional parts of controlling how often and easily punched targets will impact a surface and will only activate if specific conditions are met. ** A Slider will trigger if a punched target impacts a surface at an angle greater than 55° relative to their knockback trajectory. ** A Bouncer will trigger if a punched target impacts an obstacle in their trajectory path with less than 50% of their hitbox vertically. Bouncers tend to occur less often as they depend heavily on the shape of nearby geometry. * If Rocket Punch collides with another ability with Collide property ([[File:Ability-reinhardt3.png|sub|link=Reinhardt#Charge|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Reinhardt#Charge|Charge]], [[File:Shield Bash.png|sub|link=Brigitte#Shield Bash|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Brigitte#Shield Bash|Shield Bash]], [[File:Whirlwind Dash.png|sub|link=Vendetta#Whirlwind Dash|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Vendetta#Whirlwind Dash|Whirlwind Dash]], a charging [[File:Ability-ashe4.png|sub|link=Ashe#B.O.B.|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Ashe#B.O.B.|B.O.B.]], or another ''Could not find 'Rocket Punch' in 'Abilities'. Check spelling and see [[Help:Cargo]] if the issue persists.'') both participants get [[Crowd Control#Knock Down|knocked down]] for 1.7 seconds. This is also called 'The Stalemate Mechanic'. ** The Blastback effect of Rocket Punch will ignore and override the Stalemate mechanic where applicable. * While the Melee keyword states that it is blocked by Ignore Melee abilities (e.g. [[File:Ability_JavelinSpin.png|sub|link=Orisa#Javelin Spin|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Orisa#Javelin Spin|Javelin Spin]], [[File:Ability-genji2.png|sub|link=Genji#Deflect|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Genji#Deflect|Deflect]]), the Stun can go through and interrupt these abilities, which allows the punch to connect. ** If the target is [[Unstoppable]] or the Ignore Melee ability cannot be interrupted, for example Orisa during [[File:Ability Orisa Fortify.png|sub|link=Orisa#Fortify|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Orisa#Fortify|Fortify]], they will not take damage from the punch, but the blastback effect to enemies behind them will still apply. * Rocket Punch's wall-impact trajectory can be altered mid-motion by other knockback effects. * Rocket Punch can be cancelled by activating any other ability or pressing primary fire. ** If Rocket Punch is cancelled through aforementioned means by Doomfist during the charge, the empowered state is not consumed. But if the punch has already started, the empowered state will be consumed. * If Rocket Punch is interrupted by enemy crowd control, it goes on cooldown and the empowered state is lost. * Rocket Punch's speed buff while punching does not count towards global speed buff cap. * The punch is not stopped by fences or other breakables in its path, destroying them as it passes through.

0.5 seconds (stun, punch impact)

abilities.name: Rocket Punch (old)

raw.shot type: [[File:Quick_melee.png|40x40px|sub|class=inline-icon invert-image|link=Melee|Melee ]] Melee
raw.official description: After charging up, Doomfist lunges forward and knocks an enemy back, dealing additional damage if they impact a wall.
raw.cast time:
0.192 min. charge time
1.4 seconds to fully charge
2 second max. charge time
raw.ability details:
* Damage, distance traveled, and knock back all scale with the charge time.
* It takes ~0.93 seconds of charging in order to kill a 200 [[HP]] target, assuming wall impact. This translates to about 2.67 bars of charge in the HUD.
* Rocket Punch stops if it hits an enemy.
* If Rocket Punch collides with [[Charge]], [[Shield Bash]], a charging [[Ashe#B.O.B.|B.O.B.]], or another Rocket Punch, both participants get [[Crowd Control#Knock Down|knocked down]] for 2 seconds.
* While charging, Rocket Punch can be cancelled by pressing the Primary Fire button.
* After being released, Rocket Punch can still be cancelled with the Jump key. This pushes Doomfist further than what he would have gone without cancelling.

abilities.name: Meteor Strike
shot_type: [[File:Ability-parah3.png|40x40px|sub|class=inline-icon invert-image|link=Area of effect|Area of effect ]] Area of effect [[File:Swift_Step_Icon.png|40x40px|sub|class=inline-icon invert-image|link=Movement ability|Movement ]] Movement

raw.shot type:
[[File:Ability-parah3.png|40x40px|sub|class=inline-icon invert-image|link=Area of effect|Area of effect ]] Area of effect
[[File:Swift_Step_Icon.png|40x40px|sub|class=inline-icon invert-image|link=Movement ability|Movement ]] Movement
raw.official description: Press Q to leap up into the air. Move the targeting circle, then press [[File:Key mouse 1.png|20x20px|link=]] to strike the targeted area.
raw.heal: 90 per second (while targeting)
raw.cast time:
0 + 0.5 seconds (initial activation)
1 + 0.8 seconds (landing)
raw.ability keywords: area of effect;;spherical::cleansable::lesser cleanse;;stunnable::health reveal::invulnerable;;no contest::phased::strong movement
raw.ability details: * Empowers Rocket Punch on landing. * While in Meteor Strike, Doomfist regenerates health and his ability cooldown rates are accelerated by 100%. * While in Meteor Strike, Doomfist is untargetable and invisible to by both allies and enemies and and cannot contest objectives while in Meteor Strike. He also becomes [[phased out]], cleansing most negative effects and stuck projectiles, such as [[Tracer]]'s [[File:Ability-tracer4.png|sub|link=Tracer#Pulse Bomb|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Tracer#Pulse Bomb|Pulse Bomb]]. * While targeting, the "Zoom Out" option on secondary fire allows moving to the highest elevation level as opposed to staying on current level. * Contrary to Meteor Strike’s display reticle, the Ultimate's area of effect is not a 2-D circle on the floor, but is actually a 3-D sphere. The display reticle is a cross section of the central point of the Ultimate. * If Doomfist selects his landing zone in a void/death pit, he will be instantly eliminated and will lose the Ultimate. * If there is a [[File:Tree_of_Life_Icon.png|sub|link=Lifeweaver#Tree of Life|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Lifeweaver#Tree of Life|Tree of Life]] at the landing location, Doomfist will slide to its side upon landing. * Meteor Strike's speed buff while targeting does not count towards global speed buff cap.

abilities.name: Meteor Strike (old)
shot_type: [[File:Ability-parah3.png|40x40px|sub|class=inline-icon invert-image|link=Area of effect|Area of effect ]] Area of effect

raw.shot type: [[File:Ability-parah3.png|40x40px|sub|class=inline-icon invert-image|link=Area of effect|Area of effect ]] Area of effect
raw.official description: Doomfist leaps into the sky, then crashes to the ground, dealing significant damage.
raw.duration:
Up to 4 seconds for select area
1 second landing + 0.5 s. recovery (invulnerability)
raw.radius:
Inner ring: 2 meters
Outer ring: 6 meters
Overall radius: 8 meters
raw.ability details:
* This ability works even when used inside an interior area and will land in that area unless Doomfist moves outside.
* Holding right click enables a birds-eye view of the impact zone, which can also be used to climb up platforms.
* The impact zone is only visible to the enemy team once Doomfist is coming down.
* Doomfist is completely invincible during this ultimate.
* Meteor Strike has two rings that do different damage. If an enemy is touching both rings, the inner ring takes precedence.
* Doomfist's other abilities recharge twice as fast while Doomfist is in the air.

duration.raw:
Up to 4 seconds for select area
1 second landing + 0.5 s. recovery (invulnerability)
